description: 10 HOLDOUT probe queries. These must never be referenced during optimization. Used only at phase checkpoints to detect overfitting.
queries: What's the gross margin impact of the roaster mix shift?
Which FTBP cohort had the best 12-week retention?
Who are the top 3 people mentioned across critical Slack threads this month?
What meeting decisions from 2026-02 are still un-actioned?
What's the PBB pilot scorecard versus the control group?
Which vault pages show conflicting answers on DHL DE capacity?
What did we learn from the Oracle Series 21x over-index that's applied elsewhere?
Which competitor roaster most frequently appears in news with price changes?
Who owns the decision on NL logistics carrier selection?
What's the current open action from the last weekly regional managers sync?
